message:
feat(assign): add resolveAssignTimeout helper and plumb timeout through reservations

Extract resolveAssignTimeout() to centralize timeout resolution logic
(explicit arg > flag > 30s default). Thread the timeout parameter into
reserveFilesForBead() and all releaseFileReservations call sites so
they respect the --timeout flag instead of always using a hardcoded
30-second deadline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
